title: yulania × jigongshanensis
intro: Yulania × jigongshanensis, a hybrid plant species, is a cross between Magnolia yulan and Magnolia denudata, commonly known as the Yulan Magnolia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Yulania × jigongshanensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antibacterial properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties and treat a range of health issues.
